name: beads-superpowers
description: Superpowers skills + Beads issue tracking for Kimi Code. Composable skills + persistent task memory.
skillInstructions: When a skill references Claude Code tools, map them to Kimi-native equivalents: use AskUserQuestion for clarifying choices; use the Agent tool (subagent_type coder/explore/plan) for subagent dispatch; use the native Skill tool to load skills; Read/Write/Edit for files; Bash for shell; Grep/Glob for search; FetchURL/WebSearch for web. IMPORTANT: this plugin tracks ALL tasks with the `bd` (beads) CLI run via Bash — do NOT use TodoList/TodoWrite for task tracking. Run `bd prime` at the start of each session to load persistent project memory.

interface.longDescription: Composable skills (TDD, brainstorming, systematic debugging, code review, verification) plus persistent cross-session task memory via the beads (bd) CLI.
